data.content:
Plan review approval, 2026-04-25

Reviewed the planning note against the knot acceptance criteria and repo invariants. The plan is complete and feasible: it keeps the primary blast radius in Codex-specific JSON-RPC translation/normalization paths, explicitly preserves both params.delta and params.text, includes commandExecution/outputDelta, and suppresses empty reasoning before shared terminal formatting. The test strategy covers both live and history-relevant event shapes through the Codex JSON-RPC session plus normalizer path, with shared formatter tests only if the implementation must touch shared formatting. Approved for implementation.
